extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNISSEN Mike won bunch sprint after leadout man Dylan Groenewegen crashed inside final 1.5km, taking yellow in Brussels.
tactical_patterns: Van Avermaet attacked steep inside line on Mur de Grammont 13% section, exploiting monument pedigree over Grand Tour climbers.
Jumbo-Visma recalibrated sprint train within 1.5km after lead sprinter crashed, showing organizational depth under chaos.
Early break targeted KOM jersey via Grammont/Bosberg double, banking polka dots before time trial stage where points impossible.

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: crashed inside final 1.5km while in leadout position, raising TTT participation doubts for stage 2
rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: positive: finished leadout role as emergency sprinter after designated man crashed, revealing hidden sprint speed
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: timed cobbled climb attack on steepest 13% gradient section, demonstrating spring classics power transfers to stage racing
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: faded in final 50m after positioning well through sprint chaos, suggesting form concerns early
